# WhatsApp Hive Subagents

This folder defines a specialized subagent hive for the multi-account and multi-provider WhatsApp roadmap.

## Agents

- whatsapp-hive-orchestrator
- hive-kiro-tracker
- hive-architecture-guard
- hive-db-migrations
- hive-auth-session-switch
- hive-provider-integrations
- hive-frontend-ux-safe
- hive-qa-regression
- hive-release-docs

## Trusted Skills Policy

Only skills from official and recognized sources were selected:

- vercel-labs/agent-skills
- vercel-labs/skills
- anthropics/skills

Avoid unknown or unverified third-party skills for this project.
